name: high-fidelity-web
description: Turns Claude into a design engineer for high-fidelity, interactive, animated marketing and landing sites (the awwwards-grade Stripe/Linear/Vercel tier). Includes a full-lifecycle build skill, a standalone quality-audit skill, and a skill for building believable 3D models for the web (procedural Blender to glTF/GLB to Three.js/React-Three-Fiber).
